title: stachys × longepetiolata
intro: Stachys × longepetiolata, also known as hedge woundwort, is a hybrid plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of hedge woundwort include wound healing, pain relief, and the reduction of fever, as well as its potential use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hedge woundwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine for its therapeutic properties.
